narrative:
Precinct Edgerton (precinct in Williams County) has 1,271 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
